tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Crazy For You Tab by Madonna, www.Ultimate-Guitar.Com  · Crazy For You Tab @ 911Tabs.Com  


ITS ALL CORRECT
JUST LISTEN TO THE SONG AND FOLLOW THE CHORDS
(Sponge-Cola Chords is Only [ch]A[/ch]-[ch]E[/ch]-[ch]F#m[/ch]-D)

INTRO: [ch]A9[/ch]-[ch]E[/ch]-[ch]F#m7[/ch]-[ch]D6[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch] (2x)
[tab][ch]A9[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]
Swaying room as the music starts[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m7[/ch]                  [ch]D6[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch]
Strangers making the most of the dark[/tab]
[tab][ch]A9[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]F#m7[/ch]    [ch]D6[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch]
Two by two their bodies become one[/tab]
[tab][ch]A9[/ch]                     [ch]E[/ch]
I see you through the smokey air[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m7[/ch]                [ch]D6[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch]
Can't you feel the weight of my stare[/tab]
[tab][ch]A9[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]F#m7[/ch]
You're so close but still a world away[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D6[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch]
And what I'm dying to say, is that[/tab]

CHORUS:(Madonna and Micheal Cruz)
[tab][ch]A9[/ch]
I'm crazy for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]        [ch]C#m[/ch]/[ch]C#m7[/ch]             [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Touch me once and you'll know it's true[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]    
I never wanted anyone like this[/tab]
[tab][ch]A9[/ch]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]
It's all brand new, you'll feel it in my kiss[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                            [ch]A9[/ch]-[ch]E[/ch]-[ch]F#m7[/ch]-[ch]D6[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch]
I'm crazy for you, crazy for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]A9[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
Trying hard to control my heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m7[/ch]           [ch]D6[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
I walk over to where you are[/tab]
[tab][ch]A9[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]F#m7[/ch]-[ch]D6[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch]  
Eye to eye we need no words at all[/tab]
[tab][ch]A9[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]
Slowly now as we begin to move[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m7[/ch]                         [ch]D6[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
With every breath I'm deeper into you[/tab]
[tab][ch]A9[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]F#m7[/ch]
Soon we two are standing still in time[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]
But if you read my mind, you'll see[/tab]

REPEAT CHORUS:
[tab][ch]A9[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]                            [ch]F#m7[/ch]
When you know it's true, you know I'm crazy for you[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
And it's all brand new, you know I'm crazy for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]A9[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
When you know it's true[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F#m7[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch]           
I'm crazy for you, crazy for...[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch] (PAUSE)
I'm crazy for....[/tab]

ADLIB PART: (LEAD GUITAR)
[ch]A9[/ch]-[ch]E[/ch]-[ch]F#m7[/ch]-[ch]D6[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch] (FADE)
[ch]A9[/ch]-[ch]E[/ch]-[ch]F#m7[/ch]-[ch]D6[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch]-[ch]Dm[/ch] (END)

THATS ALL HOPE YOU LIKE IT 
JUST LISTEN TO THE SONG
SEE YOU IN MY OTHER GUITAR CHORDS

ANY COMMENTS OR QUESTIONS
EMAIL ME: (MALICE)
Yu_Azakura@yahoo.com
*(0;0)* 
BYE!!! 
GOD BLESS!!! 
KEEP ON ROCKIN!!!
ROCKNOTDEAD
